Hamburgisches Welt-Wirtschafts-Archiv (HWWA)

Companies/Institutions folders

In total 10901 folders with 370534 documents and 387591 images from digitized microfilms.

For another 19487 companies/institutions exist, according to the holdings information, images on unexplored digitized microfilm (1950-1960) and/or on microfiche (1960-1980) (separate Liste).

Folder search with synonyms (via Wikidata)

Metadata about additional folders (without known digitized documents or microfiches) are here.
